purpose: Returns the list of chains supported by Push Chain for universal transactions.

inputs.name: network
inputs.description: The Push Chain network (TESTNET or MAINNET). Defaults to TESTNET if not specified.

return_type: Array of supported chain identifiers in CAIP-10 format (e.g., 'eip155:11155111', 'solana:EtWTRABZaYq6iMfeYKouRu166VU2xqa1')
notes: Chain list is derived from SDK constants. No RPC call required.

purpose: Initializes a PushChainClient from a UniversalSigner or UniversalAccount for read/write or read-only operations.

inputs.name: signer_or_account
inputs.description: A UniversalSigner for full capabilities or UniversalAccount for read-only mode.

inputs.name: network
inputs.description: Push Chain network to connect to (TESTNET or MAINNET).

inputs.name: rpc_urls
inputs.description: Custom RPC URLs mapped by chain IDs. Uses defaults if not provided.

inputs.name: block_explorers
inputs.description: Custom block explorer URLs mapped by chain IDs.

inputs.name: print_traces
inputs.description: When true, logs internal trace information for debugging.

notes: This is the entry point for all Push Chain operations. Must be called before any transaction or signing.

purpose: Estimates the gas cost for a universal transaction before execution.

inputs.name: push_chain_client
inputs.description: An initialized PushChainClient instance.

inputs.name: to
inputs.description: Target address or address+chain object for external chain execution.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Native value to send in smallest unit (uPC for Push Chain).

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: ABI-encoded calldata or multicall array.

inputs.name: funds
inputs.description: Assets to move as part of the transaction.

return_type: Estimated gas cost object with breakdown by chain
notes: status: undocumented. Fee estimation appears to happen internally during sendTransaction (progress event SEND-TX-02-01/02), but no standalone public method is documented. This is inferred from transaction lifecycle.

purpose: Constructs a universal transaction payload without executing it.

inputs.name: to
inputs.description: Target address (Push Chain) or address+chain object (external chain).

inputs.name: from
inputs.description: When set, uses CEA on that chain as execution origin (Route 3).

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Native value in smallest unit.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Encoded calldata or multicall batch.

inputs.name: funds
inputs.description: Assets to move atomically with execution.

notes: status: inferred. The SDK accepts tx objects directly in sendTransaction. No separate build method is documented, but the tx structure is well-defined.

purpose: Executes a universal transaction on Push Chain or supported external chains.

inputs.name: push_chain_client
inputs.description: An initialized PushChainClient with signing capabilities.

inputs.name: to
inputs.description: Plain address for Push Chain (Route 1), or {address, chain} for external chain (Route 2).

inputs.name: from
inputs.description: Forces CEA on specified chain as origin (Route 3).

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Native value to send in smallest unit.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: ABI-encoded calldata or multicall array.

inputs.name: funds
inputs.description: Assets to move atomically.

inputs.name: progress_hook
inputs.description: Callback for transaction lifecycle updates.

return_type: Transaction response with hash, receipt, and execution status
safety_risks: Executes contract calls that could have irreversible effects
notes: Core transaction method. Routes determined automatically by to/from fields. Requires user signature.

purpose: Monitors the status and execution progress of a universal transaction.

inputs.name: push_chain_client
inputs.description: An initialized PushChainClient instance.

inputs.name: tx_hash
inputs.description: The transaction hash to track.

return_type: Transaction status object with confirmation count, execution result, and cross-chain sync state
notes: Documented at /docs/chain/build/track-universal-transaction/. Specific SDK method signature not fully detailed in provided context.

purpose: Signs an arbitrary message using the universal signer.

inputs.name: push_chain_client
inputs.description: An initialized PushChainClient with signing capabilities.

inputs.name: message
inputs.description: The message to sign.

safety_risks: Signatures can authorize actions if misused
Phishing risk if message content not validated

purpose: Retrieves chain configuration including RPC URLs, chain IDs, and network parameters.

inputs.name: chain
inputs.description: The chain identifier to get configuration for.

inputs.name: network
inputs.description: Network context (TESTNET or MAINNET).

return_type: Chain configuration object with RPC URLs, chain ID, native token info
notes: Documented at /docs/chain/setup/chain-config/. Configuration is primarily static from SDK constants.

purpose: Returns deployed contract addresses for Push Chain infrastructure (UG, UEAFactory, etc.).

inputs.name: network
inputs.description: The Push Chain network to get addresses for.

inputs.name: chain
inputs.description: Optional chain filter for chain-specific gateway contracts.

return_type: Object containing contract addresses keyed by contract name

purpose: Reads state from a contract on Push Chain or supported external chains.

inputs.name: push_chain_client
inputs.description: An initialized PushChainClient instance (read-only sufficient).

inputs.name: contract_address
inputs.description: The contract address to read from.

inputs.name: abi
inputs.description: Contract ABI for decoding.

inputs.name: function_name
inputs.description: The view/pure function to call.

inputs.name: args
inputs.description: Arguments to pass to the function.

inputs.name: chain
inputs.description: Target chain. Defaults to Push Chain if not specified.

return_type: Decoded return value from the contract call
notes: Documented at /docs/chain/build/reading-blockchain-state/. Uses standard EVM call under the hood.

purpose: Computes the deterministic Universal Executor Account address from a Universal Origin Account.

inputs.name: uoa_address
inputs.description: The origin account address (e.g., Ethereum address, Solana pubkey).

inputs.name: uoa_chain
inputs.description: The chain of the origin account.

inputs.name: network
inputs.description: Push Chain network context.

notes: status: inferred. UEA derivation is deterministic and happens during client initialization. The getter is documented but standalone derivation function may not be public.

purpose: Generates a block explorer URL for a transaction hash.

inputs.name: push_chain_client
inputs.description: An initialized PushChainClient instance.

inputs.name: tx_hash
inputs.description: The transaction hash.

inputs.name: chain
inputs.description: Target chain. Defaults to Push Chain.

return_type: Full URL string to the transaction on block explorer
notes: Documented in Initialize Push Chain Client section. Also has listUrls() method.
